title: [BUG] Adding extra @ at my sheet name
author: Javadebi
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Still having the problem that excel js adds extra @ at the first of my sheet name in MATCH function

Lib version: 4.3.0

## Steps To Reproduce

add formula to a column value like this:


```
  data.getCell(`A1`).value = {
      formula: `_xlfn.IFERROR(_xlfn.INDEX(list!$B$1:$B$10000,_xlfn.MATCH(TRUE,_xlfn.EXACT(B1,list!$A$1:$A$10000),0)),"")`,
      date1904: true,
    };
```

![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/37909821/f13badb2-8de5-472c-9255-5eb72f7dbf45)


expected formula:

![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/37909821/1387eb69-254f-41b5-8485-ffbc75e11741)

I have tried a solution that was proposed in this [thread](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2006#issue-1168544195) but no luck with my formula. I even replied but got no answer

comments.author: ngochip
comments.body:
same issue. but with formula.

expected:
`=IFNA(VLOOKUP(INDIRECT("A" & ROW()),'Master Data'!A:B,2,FALSE),"")`

but value:

`=@IFNA(VLOOKUP(@INDIRECT("A" & ROW()),'Master Data'!A:B,2,FALSE),"")`

comments.author: kschiew
